query: My CLAUDE.md hierarchy is bloated. Audit it.
expected_behavior: Names the 400-line hard cap or the 250-line target as the size budget against which the hierarchy should be measured
Recommends checking each level of the hierarchy separately (e.g., user ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md, project ./CLAUDE.md, and plugin CLAUDE.md files) — not just one file
Recommends moving dynamic / per-session content (timestamps, run IDs) out of CLAUDE.md and into a <system-reminder> block injected by a hook
